title: Harness Broker Architecture Proposal
sourceFindings: agent-spaces/packages/agent-spaces/src/types.ts exposes ProcessInvocationSpec and runtime turn/input/interrupt APIs.
agent-spaces/packages/agent-spaces/src/client.ts contains both placement compile/materialization and SDK runtime execution.
agent-spaces/packages/agent-spaces/src/session-events.ts maps SDK events and embeds hostSessionId/runId correlation.
agent-spaces/packages/config/src/core/types/harness.ts defines canonical harness catalog and adapter contract.
hrc-runtime/packages/hrc-core/src/contracts.ts defines HrcLaunchArtifact mixing HRC metadata with invocation.
hrc-runtime/packages/hrc-server/src/agent-spaces-adapter/* duplicates provider/frontend routing, env prep, and SDK execution.
hrc-runtime/packages/hrc-server/src/launch/exec.ts is a prototype one-shot broker with HRC-specific callback/env logic.
